title: Sauced
description: Sauced is an addon for Burgered that allows you to "Sauce" your burgers using any potions at all!
body:
Sauced is an addon for [Burgered](https://modrinth.com/mod/burgered) which adds the one thing it was missing: Sauce!

By brewing an egg into your potions, you can create Sauce which adds your potion effects to your burgers, simple as!

![A Brewing Stand recipe for Sauce, where an egg can be added to a Potion, left to make Sauce, right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MOsTUoK3/images/d2ee0f52738e08b1a0a486e965b4b5a635f82052.png)

If you want the 60-second run-down, check out the video below!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hPh7OR2Mvwo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
